recommendations.title: Replicas
recommendations.overview: A scientist becomes obsessed with returning his family to normalcy after a terrible accident.

recommendations.title: K.O.
recommendations.overview: A CEO for a television channel finds his life torn apart after he wakes up from coma.

recommendations.title: Break
recommendations.overview: Lucie, a young dancer suffers an accident. When she wakes up from a coma, she and her partner start training for a dance show. On the way, she starts looking for her estranged father, a path that might lead her to life-changing love.

recommendations.title: Solitary
recommendations.overview: A man wakes up inside a room to discover he's a prisoner sent into space to form Earth's first colony, and worse - his cell mate Alana is hell bent on destroying everything.

recommendations.title: The Untamed
recommendations.overview: A meteorite deposits an alien monster with strange powers near the home of an unhappy couple.

recommendations.title: The In Between
recommendations.overview: After surviving a car accident that took the life of her boyfriend, a teenage girl believes he's attempting to reconnect with her from the after world.

recommendations.title: Next Avengers: Heroes of Tomorrow
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Action, Adventure, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: The children of the Avengers hone their powers and go head to head with the very enemy responsible for their parents' demise.
